name: Freeman, John D.
clubs: Chief executive of the Senior Class
description: A man with a head of his own. John is always open to conviction, when you see things just as he does. A preacher, student Prof. and politician.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Reed, John Alvis Jr.
description: Once he had a brain storm. Knew more in his Freshman year than at any time since. We know not where he is going but he seems to be on his way.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Davis, Olga
motto: "Work is war, silence is golden and co-education is great."
description: This was Olga's reason for taking Econ. 8 and joining the debating club.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Blacklock, I. W.
description: A stranger in the Senior class. We know not whence nor why he came.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Southmayd, Laban Howell
description: Conceit personified. Past master at meeting you and not speaking. Southmayd is handsome and can't help it. It is no fault of his. He knows how to talk all around and about a subject so as to convince his Profs. that he knows all about it and some more. He boasts of the fact that he is not in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Womack, William Vance
motto: "Boys, be careful and don't spring anything new."
description: A man brim full (?) of college spirit. Has almost lost his voice yelling for the home team.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Cheever, Louise
description: Louise has tried in vain to get a pull with the Faculty and a stand-in with the French instructor. In fact, she is a noted grafter; but with all her pranks and jokes, passing years have left her disposition as that of a lamb.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Stockberger, Arlin Earl
clubs: President of Y. M. C. A.
Plays right tackle in the Double Quartet
description: A man who always wears "Sunday-go-to-meeting clothes."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Mustain, Asa B.
description: If you see a man going about with his head raised to the angle of 65 to 70 degrees, erect in stature, and possessing manners equal to those of a statesman of the twentieth century, you can say there is A. B. Mustain. He is a pedagogue of broad experience and is anxious to get out of College and devote his life to the training of the youth of his country.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Mastin, Eleanor
motto: "She spoke, And his love-wildered and idolatrous soul Clung to the airy music of her words, Like a bird on a bough, high swaying in the wind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Blair, James Hauley
description: Short and snappy. Never loses an opportunity to tell them what he thinks. Once he had great interest in Carnall Hall and used to visit there often. Somehow he has quit.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Cole, Kenneth Elmore
description: His appearance would suggest administrator of athletics. Learned to play football at the Dormitory and knows the game. He has coached some of the winning teams of the country. Claims that a fluttering white handkerchief in the bleachers helps long end runs.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Crawford, Henry Vance
description: A small chap but can make more noise than a cackling goose. Has managed to keep out of the hall of fame but will break in some day.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Hall, Julian
description: When she starts in talking, others are apt to quit; for they realize that her elocutionary power far excels theirs.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Miller, Henry Grady
motto: "Grady doesn't want to hurt anybody's feelings."
description: A reliable player. Likes to live easy. Not especially addicted to hard study. Many a man has injured himself by overwork. A ladies' man but fickle. Never makes a date until he knows it won't rain.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Blair, Samuel T.
description: An engineer of large calibre. Knows a great deal more than he cares to tell. Rather study calculus than to talk to the fairest damsel. You can easily see that he is a Senior by his dignified air.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Lynch, Ralph V.
description: He has a voice that would make a donkey ashamed of himself. Ralph is not a sport, although his influences point that way. When college is out he returns to his farm and herds 'possums for recreation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Zeigler, May
clubs: Treasurer of Y. W. C. A., '09-'10
description: She preaches woman's suffrage from morning till night, and might have become a famous lecturer had she not spent so much time going to dances and Proctor's meetings.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Campbell, Sylvester
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Barrett, Arthur James
description: Barrett is the big gun of The Weekly this year. He is a plugger of long calibre. Wants to marry or go into the ministry after he graduates. He is best suited for the ministry.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Claude, M. Moreland
description: Admired not for the quantity but for the quality. “Prep.” always puts his money on the home team. Has special reasons for liking Kansas U. Likes to graft on the Profs. in the electrical work.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Thomas, Bennett Freeman
clubs: One of Coach Bezdek's right guides in looking after athletics
description: A rather promising young man. He offers $5 reward for the man who got his wax.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Opal, Davis
description: Opal has tried all courses in the University in search for snaps—Chemistry, Math., Latin and Greek; at last she has found one—Ethics. This, says Sister Olga, is her theme in her sleep as well as in her waking hours.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_06.png

name: David, Ralph Barton
clubs: high private in the rear rank of the Glee Club
description: He's mother's sister's angel's child. He plays the Jew's harp.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Chalmers, B. Boles
description: Fat and plump. A master of his profession. Spends most of his time chiding Engineering Profs. Very fond of the opposite sex. Takes pleasure in drawing plans for his future domicile.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Jennie, Joiner
description: One can seldom get her opinion on a subject. She is very timid and allows others to impose on her too much.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Dennis, R. Jennings
description: Particularly fond of Math. and the ladies. Takes special pride in preparing his toilet for the morning session. A long distance walker by nature and a handy man with wrench, bolts and screws.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Ira, Lester George
motto: "That's all right, boys, just so you don't let Miss Bland find it out."
description: Likes molasses and Tuxedo. A very popular man in the dormitory. Often invites his friends around to take a smoke. You can't keep a good man down.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Walter, D. Pye
description: A lean, hungry looking man who has the appearance of a country squire. Particularly fond of "Catts."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Procter, L. Wasson
description: Wasson is a grinder and cares little for social features. He is a petrified civil engineer. Varies both directly and inversely. Has lived in the Dormitory four years but has remained true to his early training.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Morgan, Elma
description: She is sometimes very noisy. The O. D. has exhausted himself trying to keep Elma from strolling in the corridors and the Librarian has used up all her blanks reporting her for talking in the Library.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Huntley, Philip Conrad
description: P. C. is a student Prof. and a ladies' man. An intellectual and physical giant. Plays a game at center that keeps any of his opponents guessing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Jones, Herbert A.
description: A man of great judgment. Saw the error of his way, repented, and came to U. of A. from Hendrix College.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Wallace, Lillian
motto: "There's nothing in the world like etiquette In kindly chambers or imperial halls, As also at the race and country balls."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Phillips, Mack Rogers
description: He is a valuable man in the Physics department and has some original ideas. He is now working on a plan whereby he will secure perpetual motion, and it is generally conceded that he has about perfected it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Keck, Henry Manford
description: Keck is the strongest man in the Senior Class—physically. He is a product of the model school, and has the pedagogical ideas of a Rip Van Winkle. Was once in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Huxtable, William Guerey
description: Billy is from Blytheville, but don't try to find it on the map. A conscientious, hard working "mule." Gives every one the glad hand.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Coyle, Norman
description: A really bright boy. Walking encyclopædia of athletic knowledge. Will cut breakfast to get a Sunday paper.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Tidball, Susan
motto: "That part in thy hair might serve for a line To divide studying hard from having a good time."
description: But it is not her lessons that Sue studies so hard. She studies the conundrum page of the magazines, and makes her friends think she is a second Oedipus.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Goodbar, Joseph Earnest
description: A man of a promising future. Here is one man who has won the admiration of Prof. Droke. He is a student and is very popular among the ladies who have work for him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Jefferson, George Fines
description: Not a brother to the other one. A man of intellectual strength. A professional country baseball player. Has knocked as many as five home runs in one game. It is interesting to hear him tell it. He flunked in society in his Junior year, and has sworn vengeance against the feminine race for all time to come.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Sutton, Beulah, L. I.
description: Beulah is such a Latin shark that some people think she will be the leader of a second Renaissance. She is an enthusiastic student of Humanism and even takes Latin Exams after Prof. Futrall has excused her from them.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Atkinson, J. Harris
description: A very quiet chap, he walks about saying nothing. He is as devoted to Buch. Hall as Powell G. is to Carnall Hall. He frankly admits that he is not much for good looks, but says he is "cute" just the same.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Bailey, Patrick W.
clubs: Chairman membership committee of Prof. Droke's Sunday School class
description: A typical Philos—Econ—Agriculture student. Always enters college late. An impersonator of rare ability and good nature. Prof. Lentz remarked that you couldn't stick him without touching his heart.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Bledsoe, John Lewis
description: A modest, unassuming youth against whom the world owes naught but—
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hall, Sarah
motto: "My heart leaps up when I behold a rainbow in the sky."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Dickinson, Benjamin F.
description: A very modest youth who is so good natured that he smiles in his sleep. Has an inclination toward co-education.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Gardner, Powell B.
description: As noiseless as a parson's turbine. Gun of no small calibre. He desires to announce to the ladies that his highest ambition is to get out of college and get married. Powell has deviated from his early Sunday School influences and, after four years' dormitory life has learned to say, "Durn it."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Morgan, William G.
description: Another engineer who possesses the characteristics of a grinder. Made his debut in society recently. He is exceedingly fond of dormitory dances.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Moon, Van Tyson
description: Looks quiet and harmless. A regular Sunday School boy. No one but him shall ever know that he has cherished a hopeless love for a sorority girl since he was a Freshman.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Curl, May
motto: "She is a girl whose sum of knowledge, never can increase at any college."
description: She can't even convince the preps that she is not their fellow classman.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Shinn, Erwin Henry
description: Used to help Professor Ramsey manage the Preps. Was once considered studious, but like all Seniors, he has departed from that habit, and has decided to do more social work before it is too late. A gun in pedagogical work. He expects to get rich teaching "School."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Graham, Simeon Burr
description: Said to be a lady killer. But up to this time we have heard of no injuries. A useful man around the E. E. Department. Grafts and walks fast.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Neimeyer, Fred William
description: He is a jolly good-natured Dutchman. He has the reputation of being a Prof. Quizzer. Took a course in society in his Junior year which came very near proving fatal. He expects to be a lawyer if he can.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Lamberton, Annie
description: Anne's seclusion and retirement has always been a puzzle to her friends. But recently she was seen in a corner of the library with a paper reading eagerly the matrimonial column.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Patton, Aaron Pinckney
clubs: Represented Varsity in the Oklahoma Debate, '09
description: An authority on Jay's Treaty. When asked by Dr. Thomas to explain Jay's Treaty, he answered: "Jay's Treaty was a treaty made by Chief Justice Jay in 1794 between the United States and Japan."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Kantz, Willie D.
description: Although she teaches in the Model School and some people think she will make a teacher, her real ambition is to be a great debater. She has already organized a suffragist club.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Childress, Virginia
description: After many bitter disappointments in love, Virginia has reduced her experience to a science, and is now in her Senior year, doing research work on "Man's Heart." She will take a degree in Masculinology.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_15.png

name: McGraw, Ophelia
motto: "What a wonderful piece of work is man!" "As unto the bow, the cord is, So unto the man is woman, Though she bends him, she obeys him, Though she draws him, yet she follows: Useless each without the other." "Love me, and the world is mine."
description: The center of gravity, around which moves the universe—“Man.”
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Kuntz, Gladys
motto: "I know it is a sin For me to sit and grin."
description: Sometimes this grin grows into a giggle, especially when she has to take three English Exams in the morning and Physics in the afternoon.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1910.pdf_页面_15.png
